
# Daily Pick – Free Randomizers, Games & Team Tools

> A free, browser-based collection of over 60 tools covering randomizers, spinning wheels, name pickers, stand-up games, agile planning tools, lottery number generators, and party games. No sign-up, no installs required.

## Stand-up Energizers

Tools for determining speaking order and keeping daily stand-ups engaging. All games support shared player rosters via the Brand Studio.

- [Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/wheel): Fair spinner for stand-up order, decisions, and random selection.
- [Speedway](https://dailypick.dev/apps/speedway): Turtle race to determine stand-up speaking sequence with podium highlights.
- [Trap](https://dailypick.dev/apps/trap): Pixel-themed strategy trap game for quick team brain-teasers.
- [Falling Letters Pinball](https://dailypick.dev/apps/letters): Type falling letters to match names — speed and accuracy challenge.
- [Gravity Drift](https://dailypick.dev/apps/gravity-drift): Space-themed rocket and asteroid game for stand-up order.
- [Patchinko Machine](https://dailypick.dev/apps/patchinko-machine): Pachinko-style ball drop for fair, visual speaker selection.
- [Momentum Mayhem](https://dailypick.dev/apps/ballgame): Physics-based orb game with special effects triggered on each capture.

## Agile Planning Tools

- [Planning Poker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/planning-poker): Multiplayer Fibonacci estimation with hidden voting, reveal rounds, and Jira-ready summaries.
- [Retro Board](https://dailypick.dev/apps/retro-board): Collaborative sprint retrospectives with drag-and-drop cards, voting, and live updates.
- [Timer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/timer): Multi-stage meeting timers with audio cues, color-coded stages, and shareable presets.
- [Capacity Dice](https://dailypick.dev/apps/capacity-dice): Roll PTO, meeting, and wildcard dice to stress-test sprint capacity.
- [Morale Thermometer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/morale-thermometer): Anonymous real-time team energy and health checks.

## Randomizers & Decision Tools

- [Random Name Picker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-name-picker): Draw one or more names fairly from any list with optional remove-after-pick.
- [Pinball Picker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/pinball-picker): Pick participants using falling letters and pinball-style physics.
- [Classroom Name Roulette](https://dailypick.dev/apps/classroom-name-roulette): Fair student picker for teachers — call on students or assign helpers.
- [Random List Shuffler](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-list-shuffler): Shuffle any list, generate team names, or split groups instantly.
- [Giveaway Winner Picker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/giveaway-winner-picker): Pick fair winners for contests and social media giveaways.
- [Raffle Ticket Puller](https://dailypick.dev/apps/raffle-ticket-puller): Draw a winning ticket quickly for any giveaway or event.
- [Coin Flip & Dice Roller](https://dailypick.dev/apps/coin-flip-dice-roller): Instant coin flip or die roll for binary and multi-outcome decisions.
- [Yes or No Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/yes-or-no-wheel): Simple spin-the-wheel for fast yes/no decisions.
- [Random Number Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-number-generator): Generate a random integer between any min and max values.
- [Random Letter Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-letter-generator): Generate one or more random letters for naming, prompts, and games.
- [Choices Spinner](https://dailypick.dev/apps/the-wheel-spinner): Editable decision wheel for any list of options — tacos, tasks, or anything.
- [Raceway Randomizer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/raceway): Race-based order picker for meetings, classrooms, and group activities.
- [Office Trap](https://dailypick.dev/apps/office-trap): Eliminate options one by one until the final choice remains.
- [What Should I Wear?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-wear): Randomize outfit pieces by vibe, lock favourites, and re-roll the rest.

## Games & Party Activities

- [Mimic Master](https://dailypick.dev/apps/mimic-master): Match numbers or emojis with your hands — reaction-time leaderboard.
- [Snowball Fight](https://dailypick.dev/apps/snowball-fight): Multiplayer snowball battle arena — last one standing wins.
- [Truth or Dare](https://dailypick.dev/apps/truth-or-dare): Hundreds of curated fun and friendly prompts for parties and team hangouts.
- [Two Truths and a Lie](https://dailypick.dev/apps/two-truths-and-a-lie): Enter three statements, mark the lie, reveal after the group guesses.
- [Would You Rather](https://dailypick.dev/apps/would-you-rather): Quick choice prompts and voting for icebreakers and team discussion.
- [Never Have I Ever](https://dailypick.dev/apps/never-have-i-ever): Icebreaker prompts with voting and sharing.

## Food & Lifestyle Wheels

- [What Should I Eat?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat): General meal suggestion wheel — pizza, sushi, tacos, and more.
- [Indian Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-indian): North Indian curries, South Indian tiffin, street food, and sweets.
- [Italian Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-italian): Roman pasta, regional classics, and dolci — carbonara or cannoli?
- [Chinese Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-chinese): Peking Duck, dim sum, Sichuan hot pot, dumplings, and more.
- [Greek Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-greek): Moussaka, fresh seafood, grilled meats, and honey-soaked pastries.
- [Ukrainian Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-ukrainian): Borscht, varenyky, holubtsi, kvass, and traditional dishes.
- [Nepali Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-nepali): Dal bhat, momo, sekuwa, tongba, and authentic Nepali cuisine.
- [Colombian Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-colombian): Bandeja paisa, ajiaco, arepas, empanadas, and more.
- [Toronto Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-toronto): Toronto icons, multicultural eats, and neighbourhood gems.
- [New York Food Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat-new-york): NYC icons, borough bites, street food classics, and Manhattan picks.
- [What Yousef Should Eat](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-yousef-should-eat): Persian food wheel — kababs, rice plates, and traditional Iranian dishes.
- [Cook or Order In](https://dailypick.dev/apps/cook-or-order-in): Spin to decide between cooking at home or ordering takeout.
- [What Snack Should I Have?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-snack-should-i-have): Snack picker — sweet, salty, healthy, or movie-night categories.
- [What Drink Should I Choose?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-drink-should-i-choose): Coffee, tea, juice, soda, or hydration — filtered drink wheel.

## Wellness & Lifestyle Wheels

- [Mini Workout Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/mini-workout-generator): Generate a quick workout by intensity and focus area.
- [Fortune Cookie Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/fortune-cookie-generator): Open a digital fortune cookie for luck, motivation, or daily insight.
- [Self-Care Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/self-care-wheel): Spin for a gentle wellness prompt or mini break idea.
- [Never Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/never-wheel): Every option is never — Classic, Strong, Nuanced, and Poetic flavours.
- [Positive Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/positive-wheel): Every result is upbeat — Motivational, Optimistic, and Celebration modes.
- [When Should I Go to the Gym?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/when-should-i-go-to-the-gym): Honest answers, realistic schedules, and motivational nudges.

## Travel & Lifestyle Decisions

- [Where Should I Go on Vacation?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/where-should-i-go-on-vacation): Spin for a destination — city breaks, beaches, adventures, and hidden gems.
- [When Should I Go on Vacation?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/when-should-i-go-on-vacation): Timing advice from booking now to best travel seasons.
- [What Car Should I Buy, Rent or Drive?](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-car-should-i): SUV, sports coupe, Ferrari, or Kei car — spin for your next vehicle.

## Sports Team Wheels

- [NHL Team Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/nhl-team-wheel): Randomly pick an NHL team to cheer for — all 32 teams or by conference.
- [NBA Team Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/nba-team-wheel): Randomly pick an NBA team — all 30 clubs or by conference/division.
- [Baseball Team Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/baseball-team-wheel): Randomly pick an MLB team — all 30 clubs or by league.

## Lottery Number Generators

Instant random quick picks for all major lotteries — no sign-up required.

- [Powerball Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/powerball-number-generator): 5 main balls from 1–69 and a Powerball from 1–26.
- [Mega Millions Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/mega-millions-number-generator): 5 numbers from 1–70 and a Mega Ball from 1–25.
- [Lucky for Life Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/lucky-for-life-number-generator): 5 numbers from 1–48 and a Lucky Ball from 1–18.
- [EuroMillions Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/euromillions-number-generator): 5 main numbers from 1–50 and 2 Lucky Stars from 1–12.
- [UK National Lottery Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/uk-national-lottery-number-generator): 6 numbers from 1–59 plus a bonus ball.
- [Lotto 6/49 Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/lotto-649-number-generator): 6 numbers from 1–49 plus a bonus ball (Canada).
- [Lotto Max Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/lotto-max-number-generator): 7 numbers from 1–50 (Canada).
- [Daily Grand Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/daily-grand-number-generator): 5 numbers from 1–49 and a Grand Number from 1–7 (Canada).
- [Australian Powerball Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/australian-powerball-number-generator): 7 numbers from 1–35 and a Powerball from 1–20.

## Settings & Customization

- [Settings & Brand Studio](https://dailypick.dev/apps/brand): Centralize rosters, brand presets, theme customization, and third-party integrations (Jira, Trello, GitHub).

## Technical Stack

- Eleventy (11ty) static site generator powering all site content and pages
- Cloudflare Workers for edge delivery and app hosting
- Durable Objects used for real-time multiplayer sessions (Planning Poker, Retro Board, Snowball Fight, Morale Thermometer)
- Browser-first design with no required accounts and privacy-friendly interactions

## Blog & Documentation

Guides on agile ceremonies, team rituals, stand-up games, and remote collaboration: [https://dailypick.dev/blog](https://dailypick.dev/blog)

## GitHub & Deployment

- Source: https://github.com/Dimakoua/dailypick
- Live: https://dailypick.dev
